review_text: I recently bought this moisturizer from Daraz, and honestly  it has become my absolute favorite during my healing journey. ??? My skin had been through a rough patch with barrier damage, dryness, and sensitivity. I was desperately looking for something gentle yet effective  and this one delivered! The texture is super lightweight, non-greasy, and absorbs like a dream. No sticky feeling at all, just soft, nourished skin. What I love most is how calming and soothing it feels. With consistent use, Ive noticed my skin feels hydrated all day, less irritated, and just overall healthier. It pairs really well with the rest of my routine too  no pilling or clashes. Ive tried many moisturizers, but this one stood out because it didnt just sit on my skin  it repaired it. The ceramides and niacinamide in it actually helped rebuild my skin barrier and brought my glow back. ???? If you're someone whos struggling with dryness, a damaged barrier, or just wants a no-nonsense, effective moisturiser Id highly recommend giving this one a try. Im so glad I trusted this  worth every rupee! ?? Rating: 5/5 from me!
